name: druid-grove
summary: A sacred clearing. Ring of standing stones or old trees around a ritual center. No built walls — the grove IS the sanctuary.

accent.purpose: ritual center stone disk or flattened earth

primary_palette.note: central living tree as the focus
clearing with a built druidic altar

story_prompts: active druidic rite mid-summer, fresh wreaths on every stone
abandoned by its circle — moss overtaking the altar, stones leaning
recently defiled — one stone toppled, burn marks on the central tree
seasonal gathering site — fire ring, temporary shelters at the perimeter

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: natural/outdoor — 0.6-0.8 by day, dark by night except braziers

anti_patterns: no built walls — use invisible walls (iw) to shape without drawing structure
the ring of stones/trees is the 'wall' — prop-based boundary only
do not over-prop the center — it must read as sacred open space
